infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NutriLens needs camera access to photograph your food for AI nutrition analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NutriLens needs photo library access so you can upload food photos for nutrition analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NutriLens uses the microphone for voice coaching features.
